# Cascading Labs

> Cascading Labs is building the future of data and algorithms, starting with web data and finance.

## Projects

- [Yosoi](/yosoi) — AI-powered CSS selector discovery for web scraping. Give Yosoi a URL and it uses an LLM to automatically discover the best CSS selectors for extracting headlines, authors, dates, body text, and related content from any site.

## Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/CascadingLabs)
- [Yosoi Docs](/yosoi)
